title: Museum Basement
body:
Hey [REDACTED], It’s been a while since I started working in archival at the MoTD. They still haven’t suspected anything so I think we’re in the clear for now.

I’ll keep sifting through museum objects for anything relevant we can send out of MythOS.. Though I think we’re going to need someone higher up to actually make a hand-off of anything important. I think we can get one of the Steve’s to apply and work as a director of marketing or something. Let me know what you think.. I’m starting to find some interesting stuff and its piling up quick.

- Chris
‎
